label: Canada grocery inflation gap
description: Grocery inflation gap = food-at-home or food-from-stores CPI YoY - all-items CPI YoY.
definition: Grocery inflation gap = food-at-home or food-from-stores CPI YoY - all-items CPI YoY.
comparisonLimitations: Country baskets, weights, index bases, seasonal treatment, and housing institutions differ. Compare growth rates and within-country percentiles before levels.
interpretation: Consumer affordability depends on price growth relative to wages or income, not the price index alone.
source: Derived from Statistics Canada; Derived from Statistics Canada
revisionStatus: Derived difference. Statistics Canada table 18-10-0004-01 may revise recent and historical observations; classifications and baskets follow the native table. Statistics Canada table 18-10-0004-01 may revise recent and historical observations; classifications and baskets follow the native table.

calculation.formula: Grocery inflation gap = food-at-home or food-from-stores CPI YoY - all-items CPI YoY.
